name: Project AEDS-88 Electrodynamic Shield Wafer Bill of Materials

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Particle Size: 15-45 microns, Vacuum Induction Melted, ASTM F3055 Standard
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Primary metal substrate for Direct Metal Laser Sintering (DMLS) of the high-strength AEDS-01 cardioid injector ring and AEDS-02 outer casing

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Gas-Pressure Sintered (GPSS) Solid Blank Sleeve, High Density, Zero Porosity, ASTM C1161 Standard
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Provides the ultra-hard, non-conductive internal blast shield lining to entirely eliminate micro-pitting erosion and wall friction

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.item: Implant-Grade Titanium Alloy Powder (Ti6Al4V ELI Grade 23)
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Extra Low Interstitial, Gas Atomized Spherical Powder, ASTM F136 Standard
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Raw metal substrate used to DMLS print the fine-gauge trajectory split sorting channels within the AEDS-03 exit manifold

thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_energy_rec.specification: P-type and N-type Semiconductor Pairs, Doped for High-Temperature Differential Performance up to 400C
thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_energy_rec.purpose: Populates the concentric outer shell of the AEDS-02 cavitation core to drive Seebeck power regeneration

thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_energy_rec.specification: Thickness: 28 microns, Poling Strain Vector d33: 33 pC/N, High-Temperature Metallized Aluminum Contacts
thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_energy_rec.purpose: Constructs the secondary acoustic noise recovery rings behind the internal Silicon Nitride ceramic liners

thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_energy_rec.specification: 99.99% Pure High-Conductivity Copper, Thickness: 0.5mm, Dead-Soft Temper
thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_energy_rec.purpose: Forms the positive and negative bus-bar collectors for harvesting Seebeck current from the core jacket

extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_fil.specification: Self-Energizing Profile, Outer Diameter: 110.0mm, Section Cross-Thickness: 2.4mm
extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_fil.purpose: Establishes a permanent gas-tight metallic compression seal at the primary inter-module flange splits

extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_fil.specification: Durometer Hardness: 80A, Temperature Range: -60C to 200C, Resistant to Volatile Outgassing
extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_fil.purpose: Provides secondary backup sealing bounds inside the outer coaxial thermal-siphon pre-heater jackets

extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_fil.specification: Porosity: 5 microns, High-Temperature Diffusion-Bonded Matrix Discs
extreme_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_fil.purpose: Positioned inside the re-siphoning collar entry throats to trap volatile carbon soot and dust before it enters the return tracks
